articles.summary: 提出BadWorld，首个无标签对抗攻击框架，用于评估视觉世界模型（VWM）的鲁棒性。攻击者无需未来视频或用户控制信息，仅通过单张上下文图像即可生成误导性动作条件视频，揭示现有VWM的脆弱性。

articles.title: VisualClaw: A Real-Time, Personalized Agent for the Physical World
articles.excerpt: Vision language models are serving as general-purpose interfaces for complex multimodal tasks. However, deployment still faces three gaps: VLMs typically incur high latency and cost when processing dense video frames and long prompts, the agent scaffold remains static after deployment, and standard video-QA benchmarks do not test whether agents can use visual evidence inside tool-using workspaces.
articles.summary: 针对VLM部署中的高延迟成本、静态agent支架和工具使用证据缺失问题，提出VisualClaw实时个性化物理世界Agent，通过动态更新支架和专用视频QA基准，实现密集帧处理与复杂工具使用场景。

articles.title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
articles.excerpt: This technical report introduces VibeThinker-3B, a compact dense model with 3B parameters developed to investigate how far verifiable reasoning can be pushed within a strictly small-model regime. Building upon the Spectrum-to-Signal post-training paradigm, we systematically enhance the model through an optimized pipeline that includes curriculum-based supervised fine-tuning, multi-domain reinforce
articles.summary: VibeThinker-3B是一个仅3B参数的紧凑模型，基于频谱到信号后训练范式，通过课程式SFT、多域强化学习等优化策略，探索小模型在可验证推理上的极限，获得与更大模型竞争的性能。

articles.title: Hybrid Open-Ended Tri-Evolution Makes Better Deep Researcher
articles.excerpt: Deep research and agent evolution serve as de-facto tasks for AI agents in real-world applications toward artificial general intelligence. The former enables autonomous retrieval and integration of information in open-ended environments to tackle open-ended research tasks, yet it is constrained by the static parametric deep research capabilities of agent systems. The latter allows agents to autono
articles.summary: 提出混合开放式三进化框架，将深度研究任务与智能体本身进化相结合，使Agent在开放环境中自主检索信息并动态演化参数能力，突破静态研究能力的限制，迈向通用人工智能。

articles.title: SciOrch: Learning to Orchestrate Expert LLMs for Solving Frontier Multimodal Scientific Reasoning Tasks
articles.excerpt: Frontier scientific reasoning remains a major challenge for large language models (LLMs), where even the strongest commercial systems fall short of expert-level performance. A closer look at model behavior reveals substantial complementarity that single-model evaluation hides: different frontier models excel on different question types, and no single model captures the full picture. We present Sci
articles.summary: 针对前沿多模态科学推理任务，提出SciOrch，学习编排多个专家LLM。利用不同模型在问题类型上的互补性，通过协同调度提升整体推理性能，超越单个最强商业系统的表现。

articles.title: LaWAM: Latent World Action Models for Efficient Dynamics-Aware Robot Policies
articles.excerpt: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) leverage large-scale vision-language pretraining for semantic robot control, but often lack explicit foresight into how robot actions change the scene. World-Action Models (WAMs) address this limitation by conditioning policies on predicted futures, yet existing approaches typically rely on computationally expensive video generation with substantial pixel-level
articles.summary: 提出潜在世界动作模型（LaWAM），在潜在空间预测未来状态以指导策略，避免昂贵的像素级视频生成。相比传统视频世界模型，显著提升计算效率，同时保留动力学感知能力，适用于机器人策略学习。

articles.title: Open-SWE-Traces: Advancing Dual-Mode Multilingual Distillation for Software Engineering Agents
articles.excerpt: The path toward autonomous software engineering is currently bottlenecked by a severe deficit of diverse, large-scale trajectory data. We address this by introducing \ourdataset, an expansive dataset of 207,489 agentic trajectories spanning nine programming languages (Python, Go, TS, JS, Rust, Java, PHP, C, C++). Sourced from 20,000 real-world PRs via OpenHands and SWE-agent harnesses, the dataset
articles.summary: 发布Open-SWE-Traces数据集，包含来自20,000个真实PR的207,489条智能体轨迹，覆盖9种编程语言。提出双模式多语言蒸馏方法，推动软件工程智能体从有限数据瓶颈中突破。

articles.title: MAGE-RAG: Multigranular Adaptive Graph Evidence for Agentic Multimodal RAG in Long-Document QA
articles.excerpt: Long-document multimodal question answering requires a system to locate sparse evidence in long PDFs and integrate clues from text, tables, images, charts, and complex layouts. Existing RAG methods mostly rely on fixed Top-k retrieval over text chunks or pages. Text retrieval can compress the context but often loses visual and layout information; page-level visual retrieval preserves the original
articles.summary: 提出MAGE-RAG，一种多粒度自适应图证据检索方法，用于多模态长文档QA。超越固定Top-k检索，在文本、表格、图像、图表和布局中动态构建证据图，提升稀疏证据整合能力。

articles.title: CODA-BENCH: Can Code Agents Handle Data-Intensive Tasks?
articles.excerpt: Advanced agents are increasingly demonstrating the potential to operate as autonomous engineers, creating a growing demand for evaluation benchmarks that capture the complexity of real-world development. Such environments typically involve both complex code and large-scale data (i.e., file system). However, existing benchmarks usually evaluate code-centric or data-centric capabilities in isolation
articles.summary: 推出CODA-BENCH，评估代码智能体处理数据密集型任务的能力。基准结合复杂代码与大规模文件系统，覆盖真实开发中的代码与数据协同场景，弥补现有基准仅单独评估代码或数据能力的缺陷。

articles.title: Ling and Ring 2.6 Technical Report: Efficient and Instant Agentic Intelligence at Trillion-Parameter Scale
articles.excerpt: Efficient and scalable agentic intelligence requires models that can deliver both low-latency responses and strong reasoning capabilities while remaining practical to train, serve, and deploy. In this report, we present Ling-2.6 and Ring-2.6, a family of models designed to address this challenge at scale. Ling-2.6 is optimized for instant response generation and high capability per output token, w
articles.summary: 发布Ling-2.6与Ring-2.6模型族，面向万亿参数规模的即时响应与强推理代理智能。Ling-2.6优化每输出token能力与低延迟，Ring-2.6侧重长链推理，兼顾训练与服务效率。

articles.title: Nemotron 3 Ultra: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
articles.excerpt: We introduce Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550 billion total and 55 billion active parameter Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Attention language model. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Ultra on 20 trillion text tokens, then extended the context length to 1M tokens, and post-trained using Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT), Reinforcement Learning (RL), and Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD). Nemotron 3 Ultra is o
articles.summary: Nemotron 3 Ultra是一个550B总参数/55B激活的MoE混合Mamba-Transformer模型，在20T文本上预训练，扩展上下文至1M tokens，经SFT、RL和多教师在线蒸馏后训练，开放发布以推动代理推理研究。
